title: unexpected "Unsized numbers/parameters not allowed in concatenations."

features.name: packed struct literal with parameter reference in unsigned int field
features.description: Code should include a packed struct literal initialization where a field uses a localparam reference instead of a literal value

features.name: packed struct literal with type-cast parameter in unsigned int field
features.description: Code should include a packed struct literal initialization where a field uses an explicit type-cast of a parameter

features.name: packed struct literal with sized literal in unsigned int field
features.description: Code should include a packed struct literal initialization where a field uses a sized literal value

features.name: packed struct type with multiple unsigned int fields
features.description: Code should include a packed struct type definition with multiple int unsigned member fields used for parameter initialization
